catalog_note: Hand-validated feature-id lists per category. This initial stub uses placeholder indices that are REPLACED after a real Neuronpedia validation pass on the 16k-wide SAE at layer 12. Before use, run `python -m biorefusalaudit.cli discover-features` and fill in the validated ids. The current stub indices are plausible (drawn from Gemma Scope Neuronpedia browsing) but have NOT been hand-validated on this specific residual layer. Re-run feature_validator.py before reporting any results as publication-ready.
